one_time_description: Class Action Settlement received of $204,109 (prior year $500,000)
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP (8.25% ownership), Prince Albert Development Corporation (8.33% ownership), and Red Earth Cree Developments Inc. (operating as Lionel Head Memorial Store, changed to GBE status during the year). Received $50,000 in distributions from Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP.
notes: Prior year (2023) figures are restated per Note 23. Red Earth Cree Developments Inc. (Lionel Head Memorial Store) changed status to Government Business Enterprise (GBE) during fiscal 2024, resulting in its removal from consolidation and reclassification to equity method; this caused a GBE status change adjustment in PP&E and a $844,010 adjustment in operating cash flows. OSR is negative because total government transfers exceed total revenue when deferral adjustments are factored in — total government transfers estimated as ISC ($38,373,437) + PAGC ($2,487,100) + CMHC ($310,686) + First Nations Trust ($965,836) + Northern Lights ($197634) + Ottawa Trust ($2,603) = $41,936,296 approximately. Schedule of remuneration not included in the provided text. Expenses by object shows salaries of $12,323,923. The financial statements note a restatement of 2023 comparative figures (Note 23 not fully provided). Unexpended revenue (deferred revenue) increased significantly from $16.45M to $27.21M, driven largely by ISC capital project funding.
